tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
All the right friends in all the right places[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
So yeah, we're going down[/tab]
They've got
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
All the right moves and all the right faces[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
So yeah, we're going down[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Let's paint the picture[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
of the perfect place[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
They've got it better then when anyone's told ya[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
They'll be the King of Hearts, and you're the Queen of Spades[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]
Then we'll fight for you like we were your soldiers[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
I know we've got it good[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
but they've got it made[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]
And the grass is getting greener each day[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
I know things are looking up, but soon they'll take us down[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
Before anybody's knowing our name[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
They've got...
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
All the right friends in all the right places[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
So yeah, we're going down[/tab]
They've got
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
All the right moves and all the right faces[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
So yeah, we're going down[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
They say
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody knows, everybody knows where we're going[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Yeah, we're going down[/tab]
They say
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody knows, everybody knows where we're going[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Yeah, we're going down[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you think I'm special?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Do you think I'm nice?[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
Am I bright enough to shine in your spaces?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Between the noise you hear, and the sounds you like[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Are we just sinking in an ocean of faces?[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
It can be possible... the rain can fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
Only when it's over our heads.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
The sun is shining everyday, but it's far away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
Over the world that's dead.[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
They've got...
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
All the right friends in all the right places[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
So yeah, we're going down[/tab]
They've got
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
All the right moves and all the right faces[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
So yeah, we're going down[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
They say
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody knows, everybody knows where we're going[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Yeah, we're going down[/tab]
They say
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody knows, everybody knows where we're going[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Yeah, we're going down[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] (x2)

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
It don't matter what you see[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I know I could never be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
Someone that'll look like you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
It don't matter what you say[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I know I could never fake[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]
Someone that could sound like you.[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
All the right friends in all the right places[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
So yeah, we're going down[/tab]
They've got
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
All the right moves and all the right faces[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
So yeah, we're going down[/tab]
(Repeat once)

[Chorus 2]
They say
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody knows, everybody knows where we're going[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Yeah, we're going down[/tab]
They say
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody knows, everybody knows where we're going[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Yeah, we're going down (Am G C)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Yeah, we're going down (repeat twice)[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
All the right moves...heeey[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
Yeah we're going down[/tab]
They say
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
All the right moves... heeey[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Yeah, we're going down[/tab]

[Outro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] (x2) Softly
